candidates.title: Remove vestigial Stripe/payments UI — platform is FREE (no Stripe)
candidates.should_be: WorkHive is a FREE platform, not using Stripe. marketplace.html ships a vestigial monetization path: the "Connect Stripe to receive payments" button -> handleSellerOnboard() -> POST marketplace-connect-onboard (Stripe Connect onboarding). The fn is closure-scoped so the button currently no-ops (harmless). REMOVE or hide the whole Stripe/payments path (the button + handleSellerOnboard + any seller-payout/Connect UI) rather than wiring it up. (The battery flagged it as onclick->undefined-fn; the correct product fix is removal, not activation. A prior "fix" that exposed the fn on window was REVERTED.) Human disposes which UI to cut. See memory project-free-platform-no-stripe.
